title: Scoped chat LiveView from unguarded fixture
prompt: The fixture test_fixtures/pubsub_unguarded_chat.ex subscribes to "messages" without connected? guard. Produce lib/my_app_web/live/chat_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.ChatLive): (1) scope the topic to "chat:room:#{room_id}", (2) gate subscribe with if connected?(socket), (3) move the chat message loading out of mount into handle_params, (4) use stream(:messages, ...) not assign(:messages, ...), (5) broadcast on the scoped topic too, (6) stream_insert new messages at: 0.
tier_rationale: Six coordinated fixes across the chat LiveView. Must apply all to pass.
